questionHtml: Outline possible medical applications of the polymerase chain reaction (PCR).
markschemeHtml:
a. identify different viral/influenza strains

b. genetic testing/testing for genetic disease mutations

c. tissue typing

d. vaccine development

[Max 1 Mark]
